symbols.name: CosmosSqlGenericRepository
symbols.summary: A generic repository for managing entities within Azure Cosmos DB using SQL API.

syntax.content: public class CosmosSqlGenericRepository : IGenericRepository, IGenericReadOnlyRepository, IRepository where TEntity : class, IEntity
public CosmosSqlGenericRepository(CosmosSqlGenericRepositoryOptions options)
public CosmosSqlGenericRepository(Builder, CosmosSqlGenericRepositoryOptions> optionsBuilder)

symbols.name: CosmosSqlGenericRepository(ILoggerFactory, ICosmosSqlProvider)
symbols.summary: Represents a generic repository for handling entities in an Azure Cosmos SQL database.

syntax.content: public CosmosSqlGenericRepository(ILoggerFactory loggerFactory, ICosmosSqlProvider provider)

symbols.name: UpdateSetAsync(Action>, IFindOptions, CancellationToken)
symbols.summary: Updates all entities in the repository by applying the specified property assignments in a set-based operation.

syntax.content: public virtual Task UpdateSetAsync(Action> set, IFindOptions options = null, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)

parameters.description: The builder action that defines which properties are updated and how their values are assigned.
Optional query options used to shape the update operation.
A token to monitor for cancellation requests.

returns.description: A task that represents the asynchronous operation. The task result contains the number of affected entities.
